summary: Bake-Off v1.6.0 Feature Testing Complete - 25/25 backend tests passed, all frontend UI tests passed. Fixed PO normalization bug in auto-scoring. Verified: Run CRUD, Document CRUD, Scoring with correctness toggles, Needs Review/Final Status dropdowns, Why Wrong tags, KPI comparison table, Excel export, Auto-populate GPI.
critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: PO normalization regex in bakeoff.py now handles hyphen after PO prefix (e.g., 'PO-12345' matches '12345')
seed_data_creation: Test runs created and cleaned up during testing. 'Day 1 Test' run preserved.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bake-Off v1.6.0 fully tested. All features working: Run management (create/list/complete/archive/delete), Document scoring with truth/GPI/S9 fields, correctness toggles, dropdowns, why wrong tags, KPI comparison, Excel export, auto-populate. PO normalization bug fixed.

verified: Bake-Off nav item visible in sidebar with Flask icon
Version badge in header shows v1.6.0
Sidebar now has 8 items including Bake-Off
Bake-Off page loads with Runs/Scoring/Results tabs
Scoring and Results tabs disabled until run selected
Create Run dialog opens via New Run button
Run created successfully with name, description, date, expected doc count
Runs list shows runs with name, status badge, date, doc count
Delete non-draft run blocked with error message
Document appears in scoring table after adding
Click document shows detail panel with Truth/GPI/S9 sections side-by-side
Truth fields editable (Vendor, Doc Type, Amount, PO, Folder, Notes)
Correctness toggle buttons cycle through true/false/null states
Why Wrong tag buttons toggle on/off
Save button saves changes with toast notification
Manually edited badge appears after manual edits
Results tab shows KPI comparison table with GPI Hub vs Square 9 columns
Metrics: Ingest Rate, Classification/Vendor/Amount/PO/Folder Accuracy, No-Touch Rate, Usable Output
Delta column shows difference between systems
Why Wrong breakdowns for both systems
Auto-scoring calculates correctness when truth and system values match
PO normalization removes prefixes (PO-, PO#, etc.) - BUG FIXED

bug_fixed.description: PO normalization regex did not handle hyphen after PO prefix
bug_fixed.fix: Changed regex from r'^(PO|P\.O\.?|PO#|P\.O\.#|#)\s*' to r'^(PO|P\.O\.?|PO#|P\.O\.#|#)[-\s]*' to include optional hyphen
